title: Normalize test spec taxonomy and align BDD skill outputs
summary: Reorganized test specs by target type and updated BDD test design guidance so the skill recommends category-aware output paths under .dev/specs/tests.
results: Moved existing use-case test specs under typed use-cases directories.
Defined aggregate/use-cases/integration plus optional app-services/domain-services categories.
Reserved cross-domain and e2e roots for multi-BC and journey-level specs.
Extended bdd-gwt-test-designer canonical references to recommend output paths.
